author: peakpot1
message:
Harden picker worker (CSP, SRI, no-referrer) and lower Loon cron to */15 (#30)

worker/src: the picker page URL carries ?token=, so a compromised unpkg
CDN or a leaked Referer could exfiltrate it. Harden it:
- Referrer-Policy: no-referrer + X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff on responses
- a locked-down Content-Security-Policy on the picker page (default-src
  'none', external script/style limited to unpkg, connect limited to the
  map/geocode endpoints)
- Subresource Integrity (sha384) + crossorigin on both Leaflet CDN tags,
  so a tampered CDN payload cannot run and read the token
- /favicon.ico -> 204 to avoid noisy 404 log lines

ios-location-spoofer.lnplugin: the geocode sync cron ran every 5 minutes,
which trips Loon's "runs too frequently / high standby power" warning and
also contradicts the README (documented as every 15 minutes). Lower it to
*/15 to match the docs and cut standby wakeups.

author: Mahdi Salmanzade
message:
Fix insecure default token, harden token checks, sync webui, add English README (#23)

location-picker/server.js previously fell back to a hard-coded token
("change-me-please") when TOKEN was unset, so `node server.js` would start
and accept `?token=change-me-please` from anyone — despite the README stating
the process exits without a weak fallback. Make the code match the docs:

- server.js now exits on startup if TOKEN is unset (no weak default).
- Token comparison is constant-time in server.js and both Workers
  (crypto.timingSafeEqual / XOR accumulate) to avoid timing side-channels.
- server.js `/` map page now requires a token, matching the Worker versions.
- Regenerate cloudflare-webui/worker.js from worker/src/{page,index}.js so it
  stops drifting: this restores the iterative gcj2wgs solve (~1-2 m accuracy
  fix), the enabled flag + /enable endpoint, and the "restore real location"
  button that the single-file fork was missing.
- Add an English README (README.en.md) and a language switcher link.

author: mekos2772
message:
fix(#13): 区分 missing token (401) 与 bad token (403); docs: 说明 ?token= 必传 + Apple News 区域识别 FAQ (#11) (#16)

- location-picker/server.js: 新增 checkToken() 辅助函数
  - 缺 token → 401 + 'missing token' + hint 引导补 ?token=
  - token 错 → 403 + 'bad token'（行为不变）
  - TOKEN 环境变量未设置时跳过校验（保持本地开发体验）
  - 三个端点 (/loc.json /set /enable) 全部走统一校验

- 使用教程.md:
  - 第七节「自托管 location-picker」加 token URL 必传说明
  - FAQ 新增「Apple News / 依赖区域的服务还是判定原位置？」条目
    （#11 解决链路：设置 → 定位 → 系统服务 全开）

author: VitaHuang
message:
fix(loon): use official plugin argument array format

Loon was not substituting {latitude} in string arguments, so the script always fell back to Apple Park defaults. Switch to argument=[{latitude},...] and read plugin store as fallback.

Co-authored-by: Cursor <cursoragent@cursor.com>

author: VitaHuang
message:
fix(loon): fetch configUrl synchronously on cache miss

Remote loc.json now loads before each intercept when uncached, with configHost/configToken split and 5-minute cron prefetch.

author: ppanphper
message:
fix(picker): 高德选点用迭代反解 GCJ-02→WGS-84，消除亚米级残差

粗反解在上海等地有最大约 2.2m 往返残差，改为 3 次迭代反解后
往返误差 <0.001m。确保在高德/卫星底图上点选的坐标存为准确的
WGS-84（Apple 定位所需），无偏移。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: mekos2772
message:
fix(stash): 恢复 url 为默认，加 path 选项为注释备用

上一改动把 script-providers 从 url 直接改成 path，会干扰网络正常、DNS 正常的用户。

改为显式两种模式：
- 模式 A（默认）：远程 url，与上一版行为一致，所有现有用户不受影响
- 模式 B（注释里）：本地 path，供 DNS 被污染的用户启用

不要两个同时启用。

author: mekos2772
message:
fix(stash): script-providers 改为 path 本地模式

Stash 的 script-providers 支持 path 字段（不限 url）。本模式下：
- Stash 启动加载本目录及子目录里的 JS 文件
- 不发起任何 DNS 查询
- 完全绕开 DNS 受限环境（家庭路由器返 0.0.0.0）

用户使用方式（README 会补详细说明）：
1. 把 location-spoofer.js 复制到 iOS Files App → On My iPhone → Stash 同目录
2. 导入本 .stoverride
3. Stash 自动读取本地脚本，不再尝试联网下载

在 .stoverride 顶部注释里把部署步骤写明，并把远程 URL 模式作为注释保留以备选。
